hero_title_accent: KYC and KYB Onboarding for VASPs
hero_subtitle: SFTY connects company registry data, sanctions screening, and provider outputs into a structured workflow that preserves evidence and tracks status updates post-onboarding.

problem_description: Compliance teams struggle to track ongoing changes in company registry data after onboarding, creating gaps between status updates and risk reviews. This fragmentation slows detection of critical changes and weakens the audit trail for regulatory and internal oversight.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY links company registry updates, KYC/KYB provider checks, sanctions screening and onboarding decisions into one risk-based workflow with full audit trail for ongoing compliance monitoring.
workflow_title: From registry checks to updated onboarding status
workflow_description: SFTY connects company registry data, sanctions screening and risk rules to monitor status changes that trigger onboarding reviews and evidence preservation for compliance teams.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit

why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for company status monitoring?
faq_1_answer: SFTY structures company status monitoring by connecting registry checks, sanctions, PEP screening and risk signals into a connected workflow for ongoing compliance and audit-ready oversight.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY manage ongoing company checks?
faq_2_answer: SFTY automates risk-based routing and review of company status changes, linking updates to customer records and opening cases for manual or automated follow-up within compliance workflows.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve onboarding audit evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves onboarding history by recording decision logs, evidence packages and related provider outputs, supporting a traceable audit trail tied to each company status review.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing KYC and KYB providers?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY connects multiple KYC and KYB providers to connect disparate data, enabling multi-provider orchestration without disrupting existing vendor setups or workflows.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace KYC or KYB providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace KYC or KYB providers but adds a compliance layer that turns their outputs into structured workflows, cases, decisions and reporting.
final_description: Review how SFTY connects company registry data, sanctions results and onboarding evidence into controlled compliance operations.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
